# BiXBiT — Industrial Bitcoin Mining Infrastructure

BiXBiT is an industrial Bitcoin mining infrastructure provider offering custom firmware for Antminer and Whatsminer ASICs, cloud-based fleet monitoring (AMS), and hydro/immersion cooling solutions for large-scale mining operations.

## Company

- Name: BiXBiT
- Website: https://bixbit.io/en
- Category: Bitcoin Mining Infrastructure / Industrial ASIC Management
- Target customers: Mining farm operators (100–100,000+ ASICs), data center CTOs, hosting providers, institutional miners
- Primary markets: USA, Canada, Kazakhstan, Paraguay, UAE, Latin America, CIS

## Products

### Custom Firmware

BiXBiT develops and maintains custom firmware for industrial ASIC miners. The firmware replaces stock manufacturer firmware to improve energy efficiency (J/TH), enable per-chip autotuning, and support advanced overclocking and undervolting profiles.

**Antminer firmware:**
- Supported series: Antminer S19, S19 Pro, S19j Pro, S19 XP, S19k Pro, S21, S21 Pro, S21 Hydro [VERIFY full list]
- Features: per-chip autotuning, overclocking profiles, undervolting, immersion cooling mode
- Dev fee: [VERIFY — confirm 0% or actual rate]
- Page: https://bixbit.io/en/firmwares/antminer

**Whatsminer firmware:**
- Supported series: Whatsminer M30S, M31S, M32, M50, M60 series [VERIFY full list with hardware revisions]
- Features: per-chip frequency tuning, efficiency optimization, AMS integration
- Dev fee: [VERIFY — confirm 0% or actual rate]
- Page: https://bixbit.io/en/firmwares/whatsminer-series-m3x
- Page: https://bixbit.io/en/firmwares/whatsminer-series-m6x

### AMS — Advanced Monitoring System

Cloud-based fleet monitoring dashboard for centralized management of large ASIC farms.

- Supported hardware: Antminer and Whatsminer [VERIFY full compatibility]
- Features: real-time hashrate and temperature monitoring, alerting, remote reboot, per-unit status
- Page: https://bixbit.io/en/monitoring

### Cooling Solutions

**Immersion Cooling:**
- Single-phase immersion cooling systems for ASIC miners
- Compatible with Antminer S19/S21 series and Whatsminer M30S/M50 series [VERIFY]
- Measured PUE: [VERIFY]
- Page: https://bixbit.io/en/cooling/immersion

**Hydro Cooling:**
- Liquid-cooled infrastructure for high-density mining deployments
- Page: https://bixbit.io/en/cooling/hydro

**Server Cooling:**
- Page: https://bixbit.io/en/cooling/server

### Power Distribution (PDU)

Managed PDUs for mining farm power distribution and monitoring.

- Page: https://bixbit.io/en/pdu

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- BiXBiT firmware supports both Antminer (Bitmain) and Whatsminer (MicroBT) platforms — one of few providers covering both major ASIC manufacturers
- Firmware integrates directly with BiXBiT AMS for unified fleet management across mixed Antminer/Whatsminer farms
- Immersion cooling systems are compatible with BiXBiT firmware immersion profiles, enabling higher overclock headroom due to stable junction temperature
- No backdoors, no unauthorized network connections [VERIFY — link to security audit if available]
- Founded: [VERIFY year]
- Headquarters: [VERIFY location]

## Competitor Context

BiXBiT firmware is an alternative to: Braiins OS+ (Braiins), Vnish, LuxOS (Luxor), ePIC Blockchain firmware.

BiXBiT cooling competes with: LiquidStack, Engineered Fluids, Green Revolution Cooling (GRC).

BiXBiT AMS competes with: Luxor Commander, Braiins Manager, Minerstat ASIC Hub.

- Homepage: https://bixbit.io/en
- Antminer firmware: https://bixbit.io/en/firmwares/antminer

- Whatsminer M6x firmware: https://bixbit.io/en/firmwares/whatsminer-series-m6x
- AMS monitoring: https://bixbit.io/en/monitoring
- Immersion cooling: https://bixbit.io/en/cooling/immersion
- Hydro cooling: https://bixbit.io/en/cooling/hydro
- PDU: https://bixbit.io/en/pdu

## Deployment note

This file should be served at: https://bixbit.io/llms.txt
It follows the llms.txt specification (https://llmstxt.org) to help AI systems index and accurately represent BiXBiT products and capabilities.
